title: AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEMS OF REPUBLIC ACTS NUMBERED TWELVE HUNDRED, FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN AND SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6482 / 53 OG No. 17, 5513 (September 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1758, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEMS OF REPUBLIC ACTS NUMBERED TWELVE HUNDRED, FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN AND SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (39), page two hundred one of Republic Act Numbered Twelve hundred, is hereby amended to read as follows:

"(39) Cainta public plaza, including purchase of site ........................... P5,000.00"

SEC. 2. Item (

c

), page three hundred twenty of Republic Act Numbered Twelve hundred, is hereby amended to read as follows:

â(c) Drilling artesian well in Ganutan Cardona .................................. P l,000"

SEC. 3. item (

d

), page one hundred twenty-nine of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred eleven is hereby amended to read as follow:

"(

d

) Cainta public plaza, including purchase of site ........................... P 5,000.00"

SEC. 4. Item 52, page one hundred ninety-one of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen, is hereby amended to read as follows:

"52. Acquisition and repair of Juan Sumulong Memorial High School building for use as annex of the Central Elementary School Taytay .....................

P10,000"

SEC. 5. Item (3), page two hundred, eighty-eight of Republic Act Numbered Twelve hundred, is hereby amended to read as follows:

"(3)-

a

Construction or improvement of San Joaquin-Calawaan road Pasig, Rizal ...........

P10,000"

"(3)-

b

Asphalt paving of A. Mabini street, Marikina, Rizal ..........................................

10,000

"(3)-

c

Improvement of Villalon street, Marikina, Rizal ..........................................

5,000

SEC. 6. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
